description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a long, slightly curved wooden handle and a solid, rectangular black metal head. The handle appears to be made from a single piece of wood, smoothly finished with a natural brown color and subtle grain patterns visible along its length. The head is blocky and heavy, with a flat striking face and no visible claws or peens, suggesting it is a sledge-type hammer designed for delivering powerful blows. The transition between the handle and the head is seamless, with the head securely mounted onto the handle. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements on either the handle or the head. The overall appearance is utilitarian and clean, with no signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A sturdy hammer with a long, curved wooden handle and a solid black rectangular metal head, designed for heavy-duty striking tasks. The finish is clean and utilitarian, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the hammer head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and slight curve of the handle, as well as the rectangular shape of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hammer head and the handle's attachment point.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the full length of the handle and the blocky head from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: wooden slightly curved handle, smooth finish, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head, flat striking face, no claws or peens
